$comment: SD-JWT VC Type Metadata for Age Verification. Spec: draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-16 (24 Apr 2026), built on RFC 9901. The `sd` values follow draft-16 §claims: 'always' = issuer MUST make selectively disclosable, 'allowed' = MAY, 'never' = MUST NOT.
name: Age Verification
description: Proves a holder's age via boolean age-over predicates and/or a selectively disclosable birthdate. Designed so a holder can present only a predicate (e.g. age_over_18) without revealing birthdate.

display.name: Age Verification
display.description: Prove you are over an age threshold without revealing your birthdate.

display.label: Date of birth
display.description: Never required when an age-over predicate satisfies the verifier.
